name: Review assistant
description: Audit record entries for inconsistencies, missing fields, or likely extraction errors, then suggest corrections.

name: Tutor/coach
description: Answer gardening questions using your saved records as context, such as "What bloomed best in 2025?" or "Which cultivars did I buy from Acme Florals?"

name: Maintenance prompts
description: Suggest record updates when notes, health, or growth data look outdated or contradictory. You can save Agent Helper responses or create your own reminders in the Reminders modal.

name: Summaries
description: Generate seasonal or location summaries for journals or mailing labels.

name: Dahlia questions
description: Answer dahlia questions about purchasing, planting seeds/tubers/starts, fertilizers, soil types, storing, overwintering, watering, moving, splitting tubers, and related care.
